description: Codebase Health - Extract shared utilities, migrate keyboard shortcuts to TanStack Hotkeys, decompose complex hooks, and split mixed-concern modules

userStories.title: Extract shared config file I/O utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a shared utility for reading/writing JSON config files so useShortcutsSettings and useFolderSettings stop duplicating the same getConfigPath/ensureConfigDir/read/write pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/renderer/src/lib/config-file.ts with getConfigFilePath(filename), ensureConfigDir(), readConfigFile<T>(filename, fallback), writeConfigFile<T>(filename, data)
Refactor useShortcutsSettings to use readConfigFile/writeConfigFile instead of inline I/O
Refactor useFolderSettings to use readConfigFile/writeConfigFile instead of inline I/O
Remove duplicated getConfigPath and ensureConfigDir from both hooks
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: Both hooks use @tauri-apps/api/path (appConfigDir) and @tauri-apps/plugin-fs (mkdir, readTextFile, writeTextFile). Dev mode uses '-dev' suffix on config dir. See use-shortcuts-settings.ts and use-folder-settings.ts for exact patterns.

userStories.title: Install TanStack Hotkeys and create hotkey adapter
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TanStack Hotkeys installed and an adapter to convert between MRunner's Hotkey format and TanStack's string format.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @tanstack/react-hotkeys in apps/renderer: pnpm add @tanstack/react-hotkeys --filter @mrunner/renderer
Create apps/renderer/src/lib/hotkey-adapter.ts with hotkeyToTanStack(hotkey: Hotkey) -> string and tanStackToHotkey(str: string) -> Hotkey
hotkeyToTanStack maps Control->Control, Alt->Alt, Shift->Shift, Meta->Mod, Super->Mod and deduplicates
tanStackToHotkey splits on '+', maps Mod back to Super (Linux) or Meta (Mac) based on platform
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: MRunner Hotkey type is { modifiers: Modifier[], key: string } where Modifier = 'Control' | 'Alt' | 'Shift' | 'Meta' | 'Super'. TanStack uses strings like 'Mod+Shift+S'. Types defined in apps/renderer/src/core/types/shortcuts.ts.

userStories.title: Add HotkeysProvider and rewrite useKeyboardShortcuts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need useKeyboardShortcuts rewritten to use TanStack HotkeyManager instead of manual keydown listener and modifier matching.
acceptanceCriteria: Add HotkeysProvider wrapper in apps/renderer/src/App.tsx (or main.tsx) around the app tree
Rewrite useKeyboardShortcuts to use getHotkeyManager().register() inside useEffect instead of window.addEventListener('keydown')
Each active internal launcher shortcut registers via hotkeyToTanStack conversion
Cleanup function unregisters all shortcuts on unmount or shortcut change
Actions dispatched: escape -> onHideWindow, edit-bookmark -> onEditBookmark, delete-bookmark -> onDeleteBookmark
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: Cannot call useHotkey in a loop (Rules of Hooks). Use imperative HotkeyManager API: getHotkeyManager() from @tanstack/react-hotkeys. Filter shortcuts by type=internal, enabled=true, context=launcher. See current implementation in apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-keyboard-shortcuts.ts.

userStories.title: Rewrite HotkeyPicker with useHotkeyRecorder
userStories.description: As a user, I want the hotkey recording UI to use TanStack's useHotkeyRecorder for more reliable cross-platform key capture.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite apps/renderer/src/components/shortcuts/hotkey-picker.tsx to use useHotkeyRecorder from @tanstack/react-hotkeys
onRecord callback converts TanStack string to MRunner Hotkey via tanStackToHotkey and calls onChange
Display uses formatForDisplay(hotkeyToTanStack(value)) for platform-aware rendering
Recording starts on click, stops when non-modifier key is pressed
Cancel recording on blur or Escape
Props interface stays compatible: value?: Hotkey, onChange?: (hotkey: Hotkey) => void, disabled?: boolean
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: Import useHotkeyRecorder and formatForDisplay from @tanstack/react-hotkeys. Import hotkeyToTanStack/tanStackToHotkey from @/lib/hotkey-adapter. Current component is at apps/renderer/src/components/shortcuts/hotkey-picker.tsx.

userStories.title: Update shortcut display and setup page
userStories.description: As a user, I want keyboard shortcuts displayed with platform-aware symbols (e.g. ⌘ on Mac, Ctrl on Linux) in both the settings and setup pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Update apps/renderer/src/components/shortcuts/shortcut-item.tsx to use formatForDisplay(hotkeyToTanStack(shortcut.hotkey)) for hotkey display
Update apps/renderer/src/pages/setup.tsx to work with the rewritten HotkeyPicker (should be drop-in if props are compatible)
Add i18n keys to en.json: shortcuts.pressKeys = 'Press a key combination...', shortcuts.clickToRecord = 'Click to record'
Add i18n keys to pt-BR.json: shortcuts.pressKeys = 'Pressione uma combinacao de teclas...', shortcuts.clickToRecord = 'Clique para gravar'
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: formatForDisplay from @tanstack/react-hotkeys renders platform-specific symbols. shortcut-item.tsx is at apps/renderer/src/components/shortcuts/shortcut-item.tsx. i18n files at apps/renderer/src/locales/{en,pt-BR}.json.

userStories.title: Extract parseQuery utility from useBookmarks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the parseQuery function extracted from useBookmarks into a standalone utility since it's pure logic with no hook dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/renderer/src/lib/parse-query.ts with the parseQuery function moved from use-bookmarks.ts
parseQuery parses query strings with #tag+syntax into structured search params
Update use-bookmarks.ts to import parseQuery from @/lib/parse-query
No behavior change — same input/output contract
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: parseQuery is defined inside use-bookmarks.ts. It's a pure function that takes a string and returns parsed query parts. See apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-bookmarks.ts.

userStories.title: Extract useBookmarkTags hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tag management operations extracted from useBookmarks into a dedicated useBookmarkTags hook to reduce its complexity.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-bookmark-tags.ts with listTags, renameTag, deleteTag functions and own state (tags, loadingTags)
Each function invokes the corresponding Tauri command
Remove tag operations from use-bookmarks.ts
Update any consumers that destructure tag functions from useBookmarks to import from useBookmarkTags instead
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: Check which components destructure listTags/renameTag/deleteTag from useBookmarks. See apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-bookmarks.ts for current tag operations.

userStories.title: Extract useBookmarkActions and simplify useBookmarks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need bookmark interaction actions extracted so useBookmarks only handles core CRUD, reducing its complexity from CC=30.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-bookmark-actions.ts with openBookmark, copyUrl, copyMarkdown functions
These are stateless action dispatchers (no own state needed)
Remove action functions from use-bookmarks.ts — keep only CRUD: list, search, getById, add, update, remove + state (bookmarks, loading, error)
Update any consumers that destructure action functions to import from useBookmarkActions instead
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: openBookmark/copyUrl/copyMarkdown are interaction dispatchers that use Tauri invoke or clipboard API. See apps/renderer/src/hooks/use-bookmarks.ts for exact implementations.

userStories.title: Split command.ts into types, guards, and plugin-loader
userStories.description: As a developer, I need command.ts (347 lines, 11 functions, 19 importers) split into focused modules so types, runtime guards, and plugin logic are separated.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/renderer/src/core/types/command-guards.ts with 7 type guard functions: isShellAction, isOpenAction, isUrlAction, isFunctionAction, isSubmenuAction, isInputAction, isDialogAction
Create apps/renderer/src/core/types/plugin-loader.ts with 4 plugin functions: validatePluginConfig, parsePluginConfig, safeParsePluginConfig, pluginToCommand + PluginConfigSchema
Clean up command.ts to keep only type/interface definitions (~117 lines)
Update apps/renderer/src/core/types/index.ts to re-export from all 3 files so existing @/core/types imports don't break
All 19 importing files continue to resolve correctly
pnpm check passes
userStories.notes: command.ts is at apps/renderer/src/core/types/command.ts. The barrel re-export at apps/renderer/src/core/types/index.ts must re-export everything for backward compatibility. 19 files import from @/commands/types or @/core/types. Guards are lines ~153-183, plugin functions lines ~306-346, Zod schemas lines ~185-270.

userStories.title: Final verification and CGC re-analysis
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify all changes pass quality checks and confirm the codebase health metrics improved.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm check passes
cargo check -p mrunner passes
Run find_most_complex_functions via CGC — useBookmarks and useKeyboardShortcuts should show reduced complexity
Run function density query — command.ts should have fewer functions
No new lint or type errors introduced
userStories.notes: Use CodeGraphContext MCP tools for re-analysis. May need to re-index the repo first via add_code_to_graph.
